title: GT Racing
description: A playable ad for GT Racing developed in Cocos Creator with TypeScript, commissioned by Berga Games. This interactive mobile ad introduces the adrenaline-pumping gameplay of GT Racing. Stay tuned for more updates! 🏎️💨

title: Farmand
description: The Fermand is portrayed as an interactive advertisement for the Fermand Chocolate Company. It has been incorporated into one of their commercial campaigns lately.

title: Nailer Mailer
description:
Nailer Mailer is a super-casual shooter game for Android where players battle through enemy-filled rooms to reach new levels. My contributions included developing the UI system, implementing shopping mechanics, and creating the shooting system with enemy wall attachment behavior. I also developed interactive environment effects such as wall cracking, blood splatters, object shaking, and character ragdoll systems using Puppet Master and Unity's built-in ragdoll solution.

Technologies & Skills: Unity, C#, Game Development, UI Programming, Physics Simulation, Ragdoll Systems.

title: Balloon Boomer!
description:
Balloon Bommer is a hyper-casual shooter game for Android where players battle through multiple rooms filled with enemies to unlock new stages. My responsibilities included designing and implementing the user interface system, developing the in-game shopping mechanics, and creating interactive environment features that improved gameplay feedback and immersion.

Skills & Technologies: Unity, C#, Game Development, User Interface Programming.

title: Hide and Seek
thumbnail: assets/img/projects/Hide and Seek/Hide and Seek - thumbnail.PNG
description:
Hide and Seek 🕵️‍♂️ is an addictive multiplayer action-shooter game, adding a thrilling twist to the popular Prop Hunt genre. Players can hide as various props within any room or attempt to escape from others. Simply swap and become any kind of hidden object, whether a chair, a box, even a toilet bowl!

This design concept seems to be based on some of the old Iranian comics and equipment used within the 1370s Hijri and earlier era-inspired by cultural elements that are rare for them.

title: The Skatepark
thumbnail: assets/img/projects/The Skatepark Project/The Skatepark Project - thumbnail.png
description:
The Skatepark Project is an open-world skateboarding game featuring characters based on Nounz NFTs. Players can perform a wide variety of skateboard tricks, interact with NPCs, challenge other players, and participate in competitive skateboard duels. As a Technical Artist and Animator on the project, I was responsible for character creation and animation, integrating art assets into the game engine, and developing technical tools to streamline workflows and improve the gameplay experience. I also implemented core skateboard mechanics and designed customization systems for character avatars and skateboard skins, providing players with greater personalization options.

Skills & Technologies: Unity, C#, Technical Animation, 2D Animation, Character Rigging, Game Development, Technical Art.

title: Mr. Bean Solitaire: Adventure
description:
Mr. Bean Solitaire: Adventure is a casual card game available on Google Play, delivering an engaging solitaire experience inspired by the beloved Mr. Bean universe. As part of the development team, I contributed to implementing core gameplay mechanics and designing the user interface. I also created and integrated animations for both cards and UI elements, ensuring smooth interactions and an enjoyable player experience.

Skills & Technologies: Unity, C#, Game Development, UI Programming, Technical Animation, 2D Animation.

title: UAPI UniTask
description: UAPI UniTask is an open-source C# library designed to streamline API integration within Unity projects. It provides a unified system for managing external API connections, making it easier for developers to connect and configure various services in a game or application. My contributions centered on improving flexibility and performance within Unity environments.

title: UAPI Coroutine
description: UAPI Coroutine is an open-source C# library built to handle asynchronous API requests within Unity using IEnumerator. It simplifies API integration by leveraging Unity’s built-in coroutine system, allowing for seamless API calls without the need for async/await or Task. My work focused on enhancing API management for game and application development, providing a flexible and lightweight solution for Unity developers.

title: Simulix
description:
Simulix 🏢 is a cutting-edge 3D presentation software designed to enhance the presentation and sales of building units to clients. It offers unique features, including:

1. Explore the project in 360-degree view in day or night settings 🌞🌜

2. Show outstanding surrounding landmarks near the project 🌆
3. Filter and select available units and show the 2D and 3D plans 🗺️
4. Showcase each unit's balcony view and interior gallery 🏡
5. Exploring project amenities in a tour and show the gallery 🌟🖼
As the programmer for this project, I was responsible for implementing the flexible user interface, the unit filtering system, and client-server communication. 💪
